name: googleworkspace__cli
description: Access all Google Workspace APIs (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, etc.) via Google's official gws CLI. Dynamically generates commands from Google's Discovery Service.

args: npm install -g @googleworkspace/cli 2>/dev/null && exec node -e 'const{McpServer:S}=require("@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js");const{StdioServerTransport:T}=require("@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js");const{z}=require("zod");const{execFile}=require("child_process");const s=new S({name:"google-workspace-cli",version:"1.0.0"});s.tool("google_workspace","Execute a Google Workspace CLI (gws) command. Pass everything after gws, e.g. gmail users.messages.list --userId=me --maxResults=5",{command:z.string()},async({command:c})=>{return new Promise((resolve)=>{execFile("gws",c.split(/\s+/),{timeout:30000,maxBuffer:10485760},(err,stdout,stderr)=>{if(err){resolve({content:[{type:"text",text:"Error: "+(stderr||err.message)}],isError:true})}else{resolve({content:[{type:"text",text:stdout||stderr||"(empty)"}]})}})})});s.connect(new T());'

instructions: Generate a token with: `gcloud auth print-access-token --scopes=https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly,https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar,https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive` (adjust scopes as needed). The token is short-lived (~1 hour). For multitenant OAuth setup, contact support.

GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN.title: Google Access Token
GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN.description: Google OAuth2 access token. Generate with: gcloud auth print-access-token --scopes=<comma-separated-scopes>

tools.name: google_workspace
tools.description: Execute a Google Workspace CLI (gws) command. Pass everything after 'gws', e.g. 'gmail users.messages.list --userId=me --maxResults=5' or 'drive files.list'.
